python-data-functions.title: Python Data and Functions
python-data-functions.moreComingSoon: More Python Data and Functions lessons are coming soon.

python-5-lists-tuples-and-dictionaries.title: Lists, Tuples, and Dictionaries
python-5-lists-tuples-and-dictionaries.description: Teach learners how to organize multiple values and choose the right collection type.
outcomes: Use tuples for fixed grouped values
why: Builds confidence with lists, tuples, and dictionaries.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-6-functions-and-modularity.title: Functions and Modularity
python-6-functions-and-modularity.description: Help learners organize code into reusable functions with clear inputs and outputs.
outcomes: Separate program logic into small pieces
why: Builds confidence with functions and modularity.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-7-files-exceptions-and-data-clean.title: Files, Exceptions, and Data Cleaning
python-7-files-exceptions-and-data-clean.description: Teach learners how to read/write files and handle messy data without crashing programs.
why: Builds confidence with files, exceptions, and data cleaning.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-data-functions-python-5-list-basi.title: List Basics
python-data-functions-python-5-list-basi.description: Learn creating and indexing lists, list methods and mutation, looping through lists through focused examples and practice.

python-data-functions-python-5-dictionar.title: Dictionaries
python-data-functions-python-5-dictionar.description: Learn dictionary basics, updating and looping dictionaries, nested data structures through focused examples and practice.

python-data-functions-python-6-function-.title: Function Basics
python-data-functions-python-6-function-.description: Learn defining and calling functions, parameters and return values, print vs return through focused examples and practice.

python-data-functions-python-6-function-.title: Function Design
python-data-functions-python-6-function-.description: Learn scope and local variables, decomposition and refactoring, docstrings and function contracts through focused examples and practice.

python-data-functions-python-7-file-io.title: File Input and Output
python-data-functions-python-7-file-io.description: Learn reading text files, writing text files, working with paths through focused examples and practice.

python-data-functions-python-7-exception.title: Exceptions and Cleaning
python-data-functions-python-7-exception.description: Learn try/except basics, validating and cleaning input, simple csv processing through focused examples and practice.
